name: Patient 29
history: Strong identification with research lab workplace and camaraderie. Close coworker left with emotional significance. Lab contrasts with less predictable personal life.
intermediate_belief: Work is the only place where I feel competent and valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: My personal life is chaotic compared to my organized work life.
coping_strategies: Over-investment in work, preparation for work challenges.
situation: Preparing for important discussion scheduled in January. Preparing for lab meeting involving troubleshooting and programming.
auto_thought: I need to excel at work to compensate for my messy personal life.
behavior: Prepare extensively for work meetings and discussions.
